prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `9473c6fb`.
codex_response:
Rule summary: all non-background singleton cells keep their positions and are recolored in a repeating `2, 8, 5` cycle. If all marked cells have distinct rows, order them top-to-bottom; otherwise order them left-to-right by column.

I used the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint and discarded the sonnet summary; the sonnet note incorrectly makes the mapping depend on distinct input colors, while the real rule depends only on positional ordering. That correction is recorded in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9473c6fb/notes.md#L1).

Implemented the task package in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9473c6fb/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9473c6fb/verifier.py#L4), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9473c6fb/generator.py#L4). No new primitive was added. The generator stays close to the family by emitting sparse singleton marks on a `7` background, using the observed input palette family `{0,1,2,4,6,9}`, favoring 3 foreground colors, and generating either row-unique or column-unique layouts in roughly the official size range.

Validation passed:
- Official examples: `pass 9473c6fb: 4/4 official examples passed`
- Generated examples: `pass 9473c6fb: 1000/1000 generated examples passed`

Artifacts are present at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9473c6fb/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9473c6fb/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9473c6fb/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9473c6fb/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9473c6fb/previews/preview_03.png).
